title: Careless Whisper
why_this_song: Careless Whisper by George Michael (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "As I take your hand and lead you to the dance floor"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'm never gonna dance again"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I know you're not a fool"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I should've known better than to cheat a friend"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Though it's easy to pretend"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Guilty feet have got no rhythm
I know you're not a fool
The way I danced with you, oh-oh
The careless whispers of a good friend
To the heart and mind, ignorance is kind

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: To the heart and mind, ignorance is kind

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: As the music dies, something in your eyes
And waste the chance that I'd been given
We could have lived this dance forever

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Careless Whisper", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Careless Whisper", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Careless Whisper" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Careless Whisper" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Careless Whisper" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Careless Whisper", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
